name: espocrm
description: EspoCRM integration for managing contacts, leads, accounts, tasks, meetings, calls, and opportunities via Python scripts against the EspoCRM REST API. API key loaded from .env only — never exposed in prompts. Supports Cloudflare Access for hosted instances.
review: Well-built CRM integration with exemplary security design — API key never exposed in prompts or tool calls, loads only from .env, no remote code execution, no telemetry. First EspoCRM skill in the marketplace filling a real gap. Complete CRM lifecycle coverage with clean modular Python structure.
